title: Quest Generation Rules
rules: Choose 2 easy / medium quests and 1 stretch quest each day.
Avoid repeating the exact same quest two days in a row unless the user is very young.
Bias quest selection toward underused but valuable modes like conversation practice and strategy training.
If a user is on a long streak, add one bonus quest.
If parent time limits are active, cut quest count from 3 to 2.
stretch_quest_examples: Get 90% accuracy on a short set
Complete a conversation without translation mode
Finish a timed round and review missed questions
Solve 3 logic items in a row
